namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    /// <summary>Generated by DwarfMapper — maps <c>global::Demo.A</c> to <c>global::Demo.B</c>.</summary>
    /// <remarks>Mapping plan:<list type="bullet">
    /// <item><description>P &lt;- P via __DwarfMap_StrEnum_global__Demo_Perm_d49e1e59</description></item>
    /// </list></remarks>
    public partial global::Demo.B Map(global::Demo.A a)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(a);
        return new global::Demo.B
        {
            P = __DwarfMap_StrEnum_global__Demo_Perm_d49e1e59(a.P!),
        };
    }

    private static global::Demo.Perm __DwarfMap_StrEnum_global__Demo_Perm_d49e1e59(string v)
    {
        var __r = default(global::Demo.Perm);
        var __s = global::System.MemoryExtensions.AsSpan(v);
        while (true)
        {
            var __i = global::System.MemoryExtensions.IndexOf(__s, ',');
            var __part = global::System.MemoryExtensions.Trim(__i < 0 ? __s : __s.Slice(0, __i));
            if (__part.Length > 0)
            {
                if (global::System.MemoryExtensions.Equals(__part, global::System.MemoryExtensions.AsSpan("None"), global::System.StringComparison.Ordinal)) __r |= global::Demo.Perm.None;
                else if (global::System.MemoryExtensions.Equals(__part, global::System.MemoryExtensions.AsSpan("Read"), global::System.StringComparison.Ordinal)) __r |= global::Demo.Perm.Read;
                else if (global::System.MemoryExtensions.Equals(__part, global::System.MemoryExtensions.AsSpan("Write"), global::System.StringComparison.Ordinal)) __r |= global::Demo.Perm.Write;
                else throw new global::System.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(v), v, "Unrecognized enum name");
            }

            if (__i < 0) break;
            __s = __s.Slice(__i + 1);
        }

        return __r;
    }
}

namespace DwarfMapper.Generated;

/// <summary>Self-registers this assembly's stateless, public-typed create-maps into the ambient
/// <c>DwarfMapperRegistry</c> at module load (zero reflection, AOT-safe), so any assembly can resolve
/// them through <c>IDwarfMapper</c> without referencing this one.</summary>
internal static class __DwarfMapperAmbientRegistration
{
    private static readonly global::Demo.M __Demo_M_56f0a3bf = new();

    private static int __registered;

    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void __Register()
    {
        if (global::System.Threading.Interlocked.Exchange(ref __registered, 1) != 0) return;
        global::DwarfMapper.DwarfMapperRegistry.Register(typeof(global::Demo.A), typeof(global::Demo.B), static __s => __Demo_M_56f0a3bf.Map((global::Demo.A)__s));
    }
}

namespace DwarfMapper.Extensions;

/// <summary>

{
    private static readonly global::Demo.M __Demo_M_56f0a3bf = new();

    /// <summary>Maps <c>global::Demo.A</c> to <c>global::Demo.B</c>.</summary>
    internal static global::Demo.B ToB(this global::Demo.A source)
        => __Demo_M_56f0a3bf.Map(source);

namespace DwarfMapperRunnerAsm;

/// <summary>DI registration for every generated mapper in this assembly (both <c>[DwarfMapper]</c> classes and co-located <c>[GenerateMap]</c> hosts). Call <c>services.AddDwarfMappers()</c> (this class lives in the assembly's own namespace to avoid cross-assembly collisions).</summary>
public static class DwarfMapperServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers every generated DwarfMapper mapper in this assembly as a singleton
    /// (mappers are stateless), so they can be injected directly. No reflection or assembly scan.
    /// </summary>
    public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddDwarfMappers(
        this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services)
    {
        global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions.AddSingleton<global::Demo.M>(services);
        global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Extensions.ServiceCollectionDescriptorExtensions.TryAddSingleton<global::DwarfMapper.IDwarfMapper>(services, global::DwarfMapper.DwarfMapperFacade.Instance);
        return services;
    }
